'''Morasil''' was one of two [[Binary star/Legends|binary stars]] in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]]. It was a main sequence star, accompanied by the white dwarf [[Termadus]]. Morasil was the much older member of the pair, possibly as old as [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] itself. Unassisted by the dwarf star, its cold, yellow light could not reach the [[Cularin asteroid belt|asteroid belt]]. However, together with Termadus and the gaseous haze between them, they gave off the equivalent light of a single bright star, and also created a much bigger [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] shadow.
